description_long: This object is a stylized group of four bonsai trees, each with a thick, textured brown trunk and lush, polygonal green foliage. The trunks are robust and gnarled, with the largest tree displaying a dramatic, slanting curve and pronounced root flare, while the smaller trees have more upright and compact forms. The foliage is dense and arranged in layered, rounded clusters, giving a full and healthy appearance. The bark texture is rough and matte, contrasting with the leafy canopies that appear bushy and vibrant. The bonsai group is presented without visible pots, suggesting a naturalistic or garden display. The overall composition evokes a miniature forest, ideal for decorative use in urban parks or landscaped public spaces.
description: A stylized group of four bonsai trees with thick, curved trunks and dense, rounded green foliage, arranged to resemble a miniature forest. The trees vary in size and form, with textured bark and lush canopies.
description_view_0: Four bonsai trees of varying sizes are visible, with the largest tree on the right showing a dramatic slant and the others more upright; dense green foliage and textured brown trunks are prominent.
description_view_1: The largest bonsai is viewed from the side, highlighting its pronounced trunk curvature and layered foliage, while the smaller trees are mostly obscured.
description_view_2: The group is seen from the opposite side, with the largest tree now on the left; the arrangement and relative sizes of all four trees are clearly visible.
description_view_3: A top-down view emphasizes the vertical stacking of the foliage on the largest tree, with the dense green canopy dominating the silhouette.
attribute_pot_type: No visible pot; trees appear to be planted directly in the ground or a naturalistic base.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The largest trunk is sharply slanted with a dramatic curve, while the smaller trunks are more upright and gently curved, resembling the informal upright and slanting bonsai styles.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are arranged in dense, layered clusters, with foliage forming rounded tiers; the arrangement is compact and naturalistic, giving a full silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense and lush, with little visible space between leaves, especially on the largest tree; smaller trees also have moderate to dense coverage.
